font_family.recommendation: Use 'SF Pro Display' features (on iOS) or load 'Geist Sans' / 'Inter' for cross-platform consistency if possible.

cards.shadow: shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: {width: 0, height: 4}, shadowOpacity: 0.3, shadowRadius: 8, elevation: 5

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'expo-blur' (BlurView) with intensity={80} and tint='dark' for headers, bottom sheets, and floating bars.
visual_enhancers.haptics: Trigger 'expo-haptics' (Selection or Light) on all tap interactions.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients in backgrounds if necessary (e.g., behind a hero image).
visual_enhancers.skeuomorphism: None. Keep it 'Flat 2.0' (Flat with depth via shadows and layers).

animation.transitions: Use LayoutAnimation or Reanimated Layout Transitions for list updates.

tech_stack.styling: StyleSheet or Inline Styles (No Tailwind configured)
tech_stack.icons: @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Ionicons) or expo-symbols (SF Symbols on iOS)

rules: Do NOT use HTML tags (div, span). Use View, Text, ScrollView, SafeAreaView.
Ensure all text is wrapped in <Text> components.
Use SafeAreaView from 'react-native-safe-area-context' for screen wrappers.
For lists, always use FlatList or SectionList, never map over ScrollView for large datasets.
Use 'expo-blur' for the Tab Bar background if customizable, or headers.
universal_guidelines: Dark Mode is the default and only mode for this Luxury Edition.
Touch targets must be at least 44x44 points.
Text contrast must meet WCAG AA standards (Light grey on Black).
Avoid system alerts. Use custom non-blocking toasts or in-app notifications.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'design_system' strictly. You are working in a React Native Expo environment. Do not try to install Tailwind unless explicitly asked. Use standard React Native styling. Transform the existing pages in /app/frontend/app/ to match this new Luxury Dark theme. Prioritize the 'Inbox' and 'Dialer' screens as they are core to the user experience.
